title: CUSTOM_EQ_001: Custom EQ slider positions persist after screen close/reopen (Save + Back + Reopen)
steps: Precondition: Device connected (e.g., Voyager Free 60+). EQ set to Custom preset.
Navigate to: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Set Custom EQ sliders: 32Hz=+6, 64Hz=+3, 125Hz=0, 250Hz=-3, 500Hz=-6, 1kHz=0, 2kHz=+3, 4kHz=+6, 8kHz=+9, 16kHz=+12
Tap 'Save EQ' button
Tap Back (←) to exit EQ screen
Immediately navigate back: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Observe all 10 slider positions
expected: All 10 Custom EQ slider positions retain the saved values: 32Hz=+6, 64Hz=+3, 125Hz=0, 250Hz=-3, 500Hz=-6, 1kHz=0, 2kHz=+3, 4kHz=+6, 8kHz=+9, 16kHz=+12. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: If bug is present, sliders reset to flat (all 0dB) positions despite having tapped Save EQ.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_002: Custom EQ slider positions persist after save + navigate away to different settings screen + reopen
steps: Precondition: Device connected. EQ set to Custom preset.
Navigate to: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Set Custom EQ sliders: 32Hz=-6, 64Hz=-3, 125Hz=+3, 250Hz=+6, 500Hz=+3, 1kHz=0, 2kHz=-3, 4kHz=-6, 8kHz=-3, 16kHz=0
Tap 'Save EQ'
Navigate away: Tap Back twice to reach Device main screen
Navigate to a different setting (e.g., Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode)
Navigate back: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Observe all 10 slider positions
expected: All 10 Custom EQ slider positions retain the saved values: 32Hz=-6, 64Hz=-3, 125Hz=+3, 250Hz=+6, 500Hz=+3, 1kHz=0, 2kHz=-3, 4kHz=-6, 8kHz=-3, 16kHz=0. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: If bug is present, sliders reset to flat (all 0dB) despite having navigated away and returned.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_003: Immediate state trigger — Save EQ then force-kill app before navigating away, reopen and verify
steps: Precondition: Device connected. EQ set to Custom preset.
Navigate to: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Set Custom EQ sliders: 32Hz=+9, 64Hz=+6, 125Hz=+3, 250Hz=0, 500Hz=-3, 1kHz=-6, 2kHz=-3, 4kHz=0, 8kHz=+3, 16kHz=+6
Tap 'Save EQ'
IMMEDIATELY (do NOT navigate away or switch tabs): Force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe from recents or OS app settings → Force Stop)
Reopen the app and wait for device reconnection
Navigate to: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Observe all 10 slider positions
expected: All 10 Custom EQ slider positions retain the saved values: 32Hz=+9, 64Hz=+6, 125Hz=+3, 250Hz=0, 500Hz=-3, 1kHz=-6, 2kHz=-3, 4kHz=0, 8kHz=+3, 16kHz=+6. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: If bug is present, sliders reset to flat (all 0dB) because the save was not committed to persistent storage before the app was killed.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_004: Multiple save cycles — Save, reopen, adjust again, save again, reopen — verify latest values retained
steps: Precondition: Device connected. EQ set to Custom preset.
CYCLE 1: Navigate to: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Set Custom EQ sliders: 32Hz=+3, 64Hz=+6, 125Hz=+9, 250Hz=+6, 500Hz=+3, 1kHz=0, 2kHz=-3, 4kHz=-6, 8kHz=-9, 16kHz=-12
Tap 'Save EQ'
Navigate away: Back → Back to Device screen
Reopen: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Verify sliders show Cycle 1 values (do NOT proceed if mismatch — test FAILS here)
CYCLE 2: Adjust sliders to new values: 32Hz=-12, 64Hz=-9, 125Hz=-6, 250Hz=-3, 500Hz=0, 1kHz=+3, 2kHz=+6, 4kHz=+9, 8kHz=+12, 16kHz=+9
Tap 'Save EQ'
Navigate away: Back → Back to Device screen
Reopen: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Observe all 10 slider positions
expected: After Cycle 2 reopen, all 10 Custom EQ sliders show the Cycle 2 values: 32Hz=-12, 64Hz=-9, 125Hz=-6, 250Hz=-3, 500Hz=0, 1kHz=+3, 2kHz=+6, 4kHz=+9, 8kHz=+12, 16kHz=+9. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: If bug is present, either (a) Cycle 1 values appear (first save only persisted) or (b) flat (all 0dB) appears (save not persisted at all).

title: CUSTOM_EQ_005: Deep lifecycle — Save EQ, background app, foreground, reopen EQ screen
steps: Precondition: Device connected. EQ set to Custom preset.
Navigate to: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Set Custom EQ sliders: 32Hz=0, 64Hz=+3, 125Hz=+6, 250Hz=+9, 500Hz=+12, 1kHz=+9, 2kHz=+6, 4kHz=+3, 8kHz=0, 16kHz=-3
Tap 'Save EQ'
Background the app (press Home button)
Wait 10 seconds
Foreground the app (tap app icon or switch back via recents)
Wait for device reconnection if needed
Navigate to: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Observe all 10 slider positions
expected: All 10 Custom EQ slider positions retain the saved values: 32Hz=0, 64Hz=+3, 125Hz=+6, 250Hz=+9, 500Hz=+12, 1kHz=+9, 2kHz=+6, 4kHz=+3, 8kHz=0, 16kHz=-3. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: If bug is present, sliders reset to flat (all 0dB) because the app state was not properly restored from persistent storage after background/foreground cycle.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_006: Deep lifecycle — Save EQ, Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect, reopen EQ screen
steps: Precondition: Device connected. EQ set to Custom preset.
Navigate to: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Set Custom EQ sliders: 32Hz=+6, 64Hz=+3, 125Hz=0, 250Hz=-3, 500Hz=-6, 1kHz=-3, 2kHz=0, 4kHz=+3, 8kHz=+6, 16kHz=+3
Tap 'Save EQ'
Navigate away: Back to Device screen
Disconnect Bluetooth (turn off device or disable BT on phone)
Wait 5 seconds
Reconnect Bluetooth (turn on device or re-enable BT)
Wait for app to detect and reconnect to device
Navigate to: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Observe all 10 slider positions
expected: All 10 Custom EQ slider positions retain the saved values: 32Hz=+6, 64Hz=+3, 125Hz=0, 250Hz=-3, 500Hz=-6, 1kHz=-3, 2kHz=0, 4kHz=+3, 8kHz=+6, 16kHz=+3. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: If bug is present, sliders reset to flat (all 0dB) because the EQ state was not persisted across the Bluetooth disconnection/reconnection cycle.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_007: Deep lifecycle — Save EQ, phone reboot, reopen app and EQ screen
steps: Precondition: Device connected. EQ set to Custom preset.
Navigate to: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Set Custom EQ sliders: 32Hz=-3, 64Hz=0, 125Hz=+3, 250Hz=+6, 500Hz=+9, 1kHz=+6, 2kHz=+3, 4kHz=0, 8kHz=-3, 16kHz=-6
Tap 'Save EQ'
Navigate away: Back to Device screen
Reboot the phone
After reboot, open Poly Studio Mobile app
Wait for device reconnection
Navigate to: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Observe all 10 slider positions
expected: All 10 Custom EQ slider positions retain the saved values: 32Hz=-3, 64Hz=0, 125Hz=+3, 250Hz=+6, 500Hz=+9, 1kHz=+6, 2kHz=+3, 4kHz=0, 8kHz=-3, 16kHz=-6. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: If bug is present, sliders reset to flat (all 0dB) because the EQ state was not persisted to non-volatile storage across phone reboot.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_008: Device asymmetry — Validate Custom EQ persistence on Voyager Free 60+ (touchscreen case device)
steps: Precondition: Voyager Free 60+ connected to app.
Navigate to: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Set Custom EQ sliders: 32Hz=+12, 64Hz=+9, 125Hz=+6, 250Hz=+3, 500Hz=0, 1kHz=-3, 2kHz=-6, 4kHz=-9, 8kHz=-12, 16kHz=-9
Tap 'Save EQ'
Tap Back to exit EQ screen
Navigate back: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Observe all 10 slider positions
Additionally: Open the touchscreen charge case and verify the EQ settings are reflected on the case display (if applicable)
expected: All 10 Custom EQ slider positions retain the saved values: 32Hz=+12, 64Hz=+9, 125Hz=+6, 250Hz=+3, 500Hz=0, 1kHz=-3, 2kHz=-6, 4kHz=-9, 8kHz=-12, 16kHz=-9. 🧠 DEVICE ASYMMETRY: Voyager Free 60+ must persist Custom EQ sliders independently of the touchscreen case state. If bug is device-specific, this test catches regression on Free 60+ even if other devices pass.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_009: Device asymmetry — Validate Custom EQ persistence on Poly Surround 80
steps: Precondition: Poly Surround 80 connected to app.
Navigate to: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Set Custom EQ sliders: 32Hz=-6, 64Hz=-3, 125Hz=+3, 250Hz=+6, 500Hz=+9, 1kHz=+12, 2kHz=+9, 4kHz=+6, 8kHz=+3, 16kHz=0
Tap 'Save EQ'
Tap Back to exit EQ screen
Navigate back: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Observe all 10 slider positions
expected: All 10 Custom EQ slider positions retain the saved values: 32Hz=-6, 64Hz=-3, 125Hz=+3, 250Hz=+6, 500Hz=+9, 1kHz=+12, 2kHz=+9, 4kHz=+6, 8kHz=+3, 16kHz=0. 🧠 DEVICE ASYMMETRY: Surround 80 must persist Custom EQ sliders independently. If bug is specific to Free 60+ (touchscreen case interference), this test should PASS on Surround 80 while CUSTOM_EQ_008 may FAIL — confirming device asymmetry.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_010: Save button disabled state validation — slider returned to original position after save should not re-enable Save
steps: Precondition: Device connected. EQ set to Custom preset.
Navigate to: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Note current slider positions (baseline)
Adjust one slider: 1kHz from baseline to +6
Verify 'Save EQ' button is enabled (tappable)
Tap 'Save EQ'
Verify 'Save EQ' button becomes disabled (greyed out)
Without navigating away, return the same slider (1kHz) back to its original baseline position
Observe 'Save EQ' button state
expected: 'Save EQ' button remains disabled (greyed out) after returning slider to original baseline position, because no net change exists from the last saved state. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: If bug is present, the Save button incorrectly re-enables when a slider returns to its saved position, indicating the app compares against initial load values rather than the last committed save state.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_011: Boundary values — Save EQ with all sliders at minimum (-12dB) and maximum (+12dB) extremes
steps: Precondition: Device connected. EQ set to Custom preset.
Navigate to: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Set ALL 10 Custom EQ sliders to minimum value: -12dB each
Tap 'Save EQ'
Tap Back to exit EQ screen
Navigate back: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Observe all 10 slider positions
Set ALL 10 Custom EQ sliders to maximum value: +12dB each
Tap 'Save EQ'
Tap Back to exit EQ screen
Navigate back: Device → Sound → Tune → EQ
Observe all 10 slider positions
expected: First reopen: All 10 sliders show -12dB. Second reopen: All 10 sliders show +12dB. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: If bug is present, extreme boundary values may be clamped, truncated, or reset to flat (0dB) on screen re-entry, indicating a save/restore precision issue.
